name: Spinach Calzone Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Spinach, frozen chopped, thawed and well-drained
4 oz Canned mushroom stems and pieces, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Divide the bread dough into 6 equal pieces. On baking sheets sprayed with non-stick cooking spray, pat each piece into a 7-inch circle.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients; mix lightly. Spoon approximately 1/2 cup of the mixture onto half of each circle.
4. Fold the dough over the filling and moisten the edges. Press together with a fork to seal.
5. Cut a small slit in the top of each calzone.
6. Lightly spray the calzones with cooking spray.
7. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown.
